title: Cranberry Pryazhki
description: A traditional Russian bread filled with a sweet and tangy cranberry filling.
instructions: Combine warm milk, sugar, yeast, and a pinch of salt in a bowl. Let it sit for 5 minutes until frothy.
Add flour, egg, and melted butter to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf. Place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25 minutes until golden brown.
Let the bread cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
Combine cranberry filling ingredients in a bowl and stir until well combined.
Spread the cranberry filling on the cooled bread, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Cut the bread into 8 equal pieces.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
